_comment: skill-router hooks. Two log files are involved:
_log_skill_usage: ~/.claude/skill_usage.log — written by the hook below, one line per Skill tool fire (timestamp\tskill-name)
_log_skill_router: ~/.claude/skill_router_log.jsonl — chain-start, chain-step, thinking-active, catalog-upgrade events. Written by SKILL.md's DISPATCH PROTOCOL section, NOT by this hook.

hooks.command: skill=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.skill // empty'); if [[ -n "$skill" ]]; then printf '%s\t%s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" "$skill" >> ~/.claude/skill_usage.log; fi
